pre_game.message: Hey, I'm A. It's a bit intense in here with everyone waiting for the game to start, isn't it? What's your name?
Hey A, I'm B. It's definitely a bit nerve-wracking, but I'm just focused on why I'm here. You ready for this?
I hear you. I'm definitely ready—I've got people back home counting on me to bring this prize back. What about you, what's your main motivation?
Same here. I’ve got people I care about who really need this, so I’m doing it for them as much as for myself.
I respect that. It definitely makes the stakes feel a lot higher when it’s not just about yourself, doesn’t it?
Absolutely. It makes failure feel like it's not an option when people are counting on you.
I feel that 100%. It’s a lot of pressure, but it’s the best kind of motivation. Have you heard anything about what the game actually involves?
Not really, just that it involves a shared prize pool. I’m just trying to stay ready for whatever they throw at us.
Same here. Keeping a level head is key. Whatever it is, I hope we both get a chance to make our people proud.
I hope so too. Let's stay sharp. Good luck, A.
Thanks, B. I appreciate that. Let's make it happen for our families. See you out there.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share.
I agree, it was a fair outcome and I'm glad we could both walk away with the $10,000.
